---
name: Skill request
about: Suggest a reusable public agent skill
title: "Skill request: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What recurring agent workflow should this skill improve?

## Proposed Skill

What should the skill do?

## Trigger

When should an agent use it?

## Verification

How should the agent prove the work is complete?

## Privacy Check

Confirm that the proposed skill does not require private names, account data, local paths, customer data, or secrets.
